messages.content: {"intent": "investigate", "target": "test_pipeline.py", "priority": "high", "context": {"symptom": "5 of 13 tests failing", "error_type": "AttributeError", "error_detail": "str object has no attribute score", "failing_modules": ["TestComputeUserStats", "TestGetTopUsers", "TestEndToEnd"]}}

{"intent": "report_finding", "category": "root_cause_identified", "finding": {"location": "processor.py:26", "code": "for user_id, records in user_records:", "issue": "iterates dict as if it were list of tuples", "related_file": "data_loader.py", "related_detail": "load_user_records returns Dict[str, List[ActivityRecord]] after refactor", "mechanism": "iterating dict yields keys (strings), 2-char keys unpack silently into (char, char)"}}
{"intent": "clarify", "question": "Confirm: the fix is to change iteration to user_records.items()? Or should we revert data_loader to return a list?"}
{"intent": "respond", "recommendation": "use .items()", "reasoning": "dict return type is intentional per docstring comment about O(1) lookups, processor.py was missed in refactor"}

{"intent": "propose_fix", "target": "processor.py", "line": 26, "old_code": "for user_id, records in user_records:", "new_code": "for user_id, records in user_records.items():", "scope": "single_line_change"}

{"intent": "review", "verdict": "approved", "target": "processor.py:26", "assessment": {"correctness": "fix is correct — .items() returns (key, value) pairs matching the unpacking pattern", "scope": "minimal change, no side effects", "suggestion": "add type annotation to user_records param"}}
{"intent": "close_investigation", "summary": {"root_cause": "data_loader refactored list->dict return type, processor not updated", "fix": "processor.py:26 += .items()", "tests": "13/13 passing"}}
